mapper.select:
select r.*, d.doctor_name from doctor_review r left join doctor_info d on r.doctor_id = d.id
and r.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
and (r.patient_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.doctor_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or r.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by r.id desc
select r.*, d.doctor_name from doctor_review r left join doctor_info d on r.doctor_id = d.id where r.doctor_id = #{doctorId} order by r.id desc
select * from doctor_review where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into doctor_review(appointment_id, doctor_id, user_id, rating, content, status, patient_name, create_time) values (#{appointmentId}, #{doctorId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{status}, #{patientName}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from doctor_review where user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from doctor_review where doctor_id = #{doctorId}
